name: @modeldriveprotocol/vscode-extension
description: VSCode extension that exposes editor and workspace capabilities through the MDP client.

mdp.serverUrl.description: MDP server URL. ws/wss use the websocket transport, http/https use HTTP loop mode.

mdp.autoConnect.description: Connect and register with the configured MDP server when the extension activates.

mdp.autoReconnect.description: Reconnect automatically after an unexpected transport close.

mdp.reconnectDelayMs.description: Delay before an automatic reconnect attempt after an unexpected disconnect.

mdp.clientId.description: Optional client id override. Leave empty to derive one from the VSCode machine id and workspace.

mdp.authToken.description: Optional bearer token sent in registration and routed invocation auth envelopes.

mdp.allowedCommands.description: Allowlist for the vscode.executeCommand tool. Commands not listed here are rejected.

mdp.findFilesMaxResults.description: Default and maximum file count returned by vscode.findWorkspaceFiles.

mdp.textSearchMaxResults.description: Default and maximum match count returned by vscode.searchWorkspaceText.

mdp.resourceTextLimit.description: Maximum number of characters included in active document and selection resources.

mdp.diagnosticResultLimit.description: Maximum number of diagnostics returned by vscode.getDiagnostics and review capabilities.
